stimulus: Reinforcement learning is a method that researchers like David Silver use to develop game-playing artificial intelligence. It involves training computer agents to learn from rewards and penalties as they interact with an environment. Imitation learning is another method. ______blank involves training computer agents by having them mimic the behavior of human demonstrators.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The convention being tested is pronoun-antecedent agreement. The antecedent is the singular noun "Imitation learning" in the previous sentence. The singular pronoun "It" agrees with this antecedent.

Choice A is incorrect because the plural "Those" doesn't agree with the singular antecedent. Choice B is incorrect because the plural "They" doesn't agree with the singular antecedent. Choice D is incorrect because "Some" is indefinite and doesn't clearly refer to imitation learning.
